homeBenefits.title: Our Approach to Your Ideas
homeBenefits.subtitle: A complete process for your ideas: research, development, optimization, and hosting to make them accessible to the world.
homeBenefits.card1Desc: Study the market, competitors, and user expectations while working closely with you to clarify goals, priorities, and success criteria before development begins.
homeBenefits.card2Desc: Continuously monitor new technologies, frameworks, and tools, integrating proven innovations that can bring measurable value to your project.
homeBenefits.card3Desc: Deliver a fully operational website and host it in a reliable environment, so you launch immediately without searching for additional providers.
homeBenefits.card4Desc: Provide continuous assistance, updates, and guidance, plus practical instruction so you can confidently manage and grow your website over time.

homeDescription.slogan: Make your ideas visible, shareable, and alive online.

homeFaq.q1: How long does it take to get a website live?
homeFaq.a1: Typically between a few days for a simple site and a few weeks for more complex projects.
homeFaq.q2: Do I need to know coding to support my website?
homeFaq.a2: No coding is required. We provide full support, documentation, and guidance so you can manage content and updates easily.
homeFaq.q3: Will my website be secure and reliable?
homeFaq.a3: Yes — every site is hosted, optimized, and monitored to stay online safely.
homeFaq.q4: Can I make changes to my website later?
homeFaq.a4: Absolutely — we provide guidance and documentation so you can update content anytime.
homeFaq.a5: Pricing is transparent and customizable based on your pages, features, and hosting needs.
homeFaq.title: FAQ
homeFaq.subtitle: Got questions? Find clear answers to everything about our process, services, and pricing.

homeHero.subtitle: We provide individuals with complete web solutions — from custom development to reliable hosting, everything handled for you so your website works seamlessly from start to finish.

homeNumbers.stat3Desc: We build long-term partnerships through proven results.
homeNumbers.stat4Desc: Decades of experience in delivering impactful digital solutions.

homePricing.title: Flexible pricing
homePricing.desc: Your project isn't limited by preset patterns: we offer fully customizable web development and hosting tailored to your needs.

homeProcess.step1Desc: Refine and validate your concept through research and planning to ensure a solid foundation.
homeProcess.step2Desc: Create wireframes and mockups for review and approval before development begins.
homeProcess.step3Desc: Build a fully functional website with interactive features, forms, and galleries.
homeProcess.step4Desc: Deploy your website and host it securely, with ongoing updates, monitoring, and support.
homeProcess.title: Our process
homeProcess.subtitle: Our four-step process guides your project from planning to live deployment, keeping you informed and supported at every stage.

homeProgress.subtitle2: Insigmark restores focus, helping you prioritize what matters now and making progress purposeful.
homeProgress.subtitle3: We ensure your effort adds up to steady, sustainable progress.

homeQuote.quote: An idea shouldn't stay trapped in your head or on your laptop. We shape it, structure it, and build it into a working product ready to meet its audience.
homeQuote.subtitle: From rough concept to fully operational website, the process is designed to transform vision into something visible, usable, and lasting.

HomeRequest.title: Let’s bring your vision to life
HomeRequest.description: We’re here to make sure you can confidently trust us with your website development, hosting, and support. Reach out! Our team will respond as soon as possible.

homeServices.service1Desc: Design and build fully functional websites, blogs, portfolios, and landing pages with interactive elements, galleries, forms, and advanced features, ready for immediate use.
homeServices.service2Desc: Provide secure, high-performance hosting with daily backups, monitoring, malware protection, and scalable storage to ensure websites stay online and reliable.
homeServices.service3Desc: Perform updates, performance tweaks, security scans, and content adjustments, keeping websites up-to-date, fast, and functioning smoothly over time.
homeServices.service4Desc: Transparent pricing with clear calculations, detailed breakdowns, and customizable options so clients know exactly what they pay for and why.

homeTeam.title: Meet Our Experts
homeTeam.subtitle: A team of thinkers and builders who turn ideas into original, fully realized digital experiences.

homeTestimonials.col1Desc: Our approach is shaped by global industry standards.
homeTestimonials.col2Desc: We test every idea against real-world needs and user expectations before building anything, so your website works as intended from day one.
homeTestimonials.col3Desc: You review prototypes and drafts throughout the process, ensuring the site matches your vision at every stage.
homeTestimonials.col4Desc: We make sure your website loads fast, stays online, and is protected, so it's ready for visitors the moment it goes live.

homeWork.case1Desc: Discover the trends transforming websites into faster, smarter, and more dynamic digital experiences.
homeWork.case2Title: Boost Your Google Scores with Core Web Vitals
homeWork.case2Desc: Optimize loading speed, layout stability, and responsiveness to enhance user experience and search visibility.
homeWork.case3Title: Boost Website Speed with Fast Hosting
homeWork.case3Desc: Learn how optimized hosting and caching directly improve page load, user experience, and search visibility.

pkg1.name: Clarity Foundation
pkg1.boldIntro: For entrepreneurs who are laying the groundwork for scalable growth.
pkg1.desc: This package is designed for businesses in the early stages of development, helping them define their direction and establish a strong foundation for future growth.
pkg1.item1Desc: Deep dive into your business vision to ensure alignment with your core values and long-term goals.
pkg1.item2Desc: Research to understand your industry, competitors, and target market, with actionable insights for your next steps.
pkg1.item3Desc: A detailed analysis of your Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats, laying the groundwork for strategic decisions.
pkg1.item4Desc: Define clear, measurable, and actionable goals that align with your business vision.
pkg1.item5Desc: A roadmap of prioritized actions that will enable you to execute on your vision and reach your goals efficiently.
pkg1.item6Desc: A one-on-one session with our senior strategists to refine your plan and approach.

pkg2.name: Growth Momentum
pkg2.boldIntro: For businesses that need to refine their positioning and systems for continued growth.
pkg2.desc: This package is for businesses beyond the startup phase looking to optimize operations, solidify their market position, and build systems for sustainable expansion.
pkg2.item1Desc: Refine what sets you apart in the market and clarify your value proposition to your target audience.
pkg2.item2Desc: Identify and define key customer segments to tailor your messaging and offerings to.
pkg2.item3Desc: Create a persuasive messaging framework that communicates your brand's value and resonates with your audience.
pkg2.item4Desc: Develop competitive and aligned pricing structures that reflect your brand value and target market.
pkg2.item5Desc: Design efficient processes that enable you to scale without sacrificing quality or customer experience.
pkg2.item6Desc: Streamline core operational systems to ensure smooth and efficient daily operations as you scale.
pkg2.item7Desc: Monthly check-ins to review progress, adjust strategy, and keep the momentum going.

pkg3.name: Strategic Expansion
pkg3.boldIntro: For businesses that are ready to expand and refine their approach to new markets and broader operations.
pkg3.desc: This package supports businesses that have reached the growth phase and are now looking to refine their strategies for expansion into new markets or verticals, and strengthen their operational foundations for scaling.
pkg3.item1Desc: Detailed planning to help you align your expansion efforts with business goals and market demands.
pkg3.item2Desc: Identifying and implementing strategies for entering new markets or adding new product lines.
pkg3.item3Desc: Develop a seamless, optimized customer journey to increase satisfaction and loyalty.
pkg3.item4Desc: Build and execute a high-impact performance marketing plan to drive awareness and sales.
pkg3.item5Desc: Boost brand visibility and engagement through targeted strategies and media exposure.
pkg3.item6Desc: Ensure your financial systems are structured for growth, with budgeting, forecasting, and reporting.
pkg3.item7Desc: Implement a project management system to keep your expansion efforts organized and on track.
pkg3.item8Desc: Ongoing collaboration with our experts to monitor progress and pivot strategies as needed.

pkg4.name: Elite Transformation
pkg4.boldIntro: For businesses that need a complete transformation — from strategic direction to operational excellence, and everything in between.
pkg4.desc: This comprehensive package is ideal for businesses ready for a full-scale transformation, covering all aspects of the business — from strategy to execution, and from operational efficiency to leadership development.
pkg4.item1Desc: Deep analysis of all operational processes, with a focus on removing bottlenecks and improving efficiency.
pkg4.item2Desc: Identify, assess, and mitigate risks to ensure your business can sustain growth even during uncertain times.
pkg4.item3Desc: Ensure your business scales seamlessly by identifying key opportunities and challenges.
pkg4.item4Desc: Provide leadership coaching and develop your team to handle growth and scale.
pkg4.item5Desc: Boost brand visibility and engagement through targeted strategies and media exposure.
pkg4.item6Title: Ongoing Strategic Review & Adjustments (up to 6 months)
pkg4.item6Desc: Continuous monitoring and adjustments to the strategy to keep your business on track.
pkg4.item7Desc: Personal consultations with our senior experts to guide you through critical growth decisions.
pkg4.item8Desc: With continuous feedback loops to track key metrics, optimize processes, and drive results.
pkg4.item9Desc: In-depth collaboration with our leadership team, including quarterly reviews, to ensure long-term success.

complementaryServices.description1: Setting up experiments to optimize conversion rates on key pages.
complementaryServices.description2: Implementing Google Analytics, heatmaps, and custom dashboards for insights.
complementaryServices.description3: Configuring websites for 2–3 languages with proper hreflang tags.
complementaryServices.description4: Integrating third-party tools like calendars, forms, or other services.

documentationSupport.description1: A manual (PDF/video) explaining login, setup, and content editing
documentationSupport.description2: Detailed documentation of code structure, API endpoints, and maintenance procedures.
documentationSupport.description3: Complete project handover including hosting access, update procedures, and changelog.
documentationSupport.description4: Live training sessions and a custom playbook to ensure clients understand their website fully.

preDevelopmentResearch.description1: A review of 3–5 similar websites to identify features, gaps, and opportunities.
preDevelopmentResearch.description2: Identifying target audiences and uncovering relevant keywords for reach and visibility.
preDevelopmentResearch.description3: Assessing platforms, hosting requirements, and technical constraints for smooth implementation.
preDevelopmentResearch.description4: Creating wireframes, user flows, and sitemaps to guide website structure and functionality.

technicalOptimization.description1: Improving page load times through image compression, caching, and code minification.
technicalOptimization.description2: Enhancing LCP, FCP, CLS, and mobile performance to meet Google's performance standards.
technicalOptimization.description3: Correcting crawl errors, implementing schema, robots.txt, HTTPS migration for search engine visibility.
technicalOptimization.description4: Ensuring WCAG compliance with alt texts, keyboard navigation, and other accessibility standards.

webDevelopment.description1: Responsive design, SEO-friendly, essential content pages.
webDevelopment.description2: Pages integrated with CMS, images, and text content.
webDevelopment.description3: Pages or widgets with forms, maps, and anti-spam protection.
webDevelopment.description4: Dynamic grids and lightbox galleries for showcasing work.
webDevelopment.description5: Product catalog and checkout functionality for online sales.
webDevelopment.description6: Login pages, profiles, and order management.
webDevelopment.description7: Special interactive features and third-party integrations.
